# `DefineScreen`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `—`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>DefineScreen();</h3>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Initialises the screenmemory zero page pointer for use in TRSE.  Some
    commands such as MoveTo and Tile will automatically initialise this pointer.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
DefineScreen();

ScreenMemory := $0400;
ScreenMemory[0] := 1;  // place the A character at the top left of the display on the C64
</code>


</div>
